text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, right before the spring G1 races
begin, Mejiro Ryan is feeling lost in regards to her
future goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen to her intently and guide her towards
focusing on what she truly wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Confronting her inner self, she decides she wants
to become a superstar racer, just like Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her still naive and fragile spirit, she
begins sprinting toward the grueling spring.
